meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: The bonds forged between us can never be broken. Not now. Not ever.
Then they should return.
Very well, little dragon. My friends! With me!
Very well, little dragon. My friends! With me! We face them together!
We face enemies above and below.
What terrible presence stood before us? And what relic does he hold?
You are an odd little dragon. But there is something kind about you.
I need an opening to destroy that relic!
No. No, we can fix this. We have to get back to the Timeways!
This can't be happening. If Murozond exists, that means Nozdormu...
Where... when are we? No, no t-this can't be right. The infinites changed the true timeline!
An infinite army might slow us down a bit.
He's siphoning Galakrond's essence into a... vessel?
It looks kind of like the Dragon Soul, but even more ancient.
Okay, let's fix this. We just need to--uh oh.
There's no way I can get us back to the past like this.
Time to get speedy!
Tyr has always been a hero to dragonkind. I just have to keep telling myself this wasn't really him...
Tyr is fighting for the infinites? No, this isn't right!
Ugh! The Timeways are even twistier than before.
Oh, you won't have to worry about him for a long time. Us, on the other hand--shoot.
Come on! The Aspects are just ahead. Uh, wait, uh. The Proto-Aspects, I mean.
Everyone! The infinites are here and we must stop them. You have to trust me!
No! We're trying to fix them!
Nozdormu! Alexstrasza! Everyone! The infinites are here and we have to stop them.
Oh no, it's Morchie! What is she doing here?
Oh-ho, we saw plenty! Not this time, Deios.
The Horde and Alliance are fighting? Well, this could be any point in time!
Uh oh. That slime is full of necromantic power!
Ah ha! Well, here goes nothing!
All right! We have to make sure Murozond doesn't... uh... exist? Uh, rise?
Be careful. We've gone back before the Aspects were even the Aspects.
But please, you must trust me! The future of dragonkind depends on it.
Can you scout ahead? I'll be with you in a moment.
Earth...? Oh, no. Ah, me and these heroes will take care of that one! You worry about the infinites!
Goodbye, everyone. It was nice to meet you all again... for the first time!
He was the biggest proto-dragon ever. His hunger nearly consumed all of dragonkind!
I know there's a dragon above us on that ledge, but we'll handle him after we defeat Deios.
I'm sorry, I'm sure you have lots of questions. But the timeline...
If Iridikron came here with the infinites, then they must be working together. Oh, that's bad... really bad!
It's a long story. Trust me.
Looks like we'll need to mop this up!
Must be far in the past then. They risk unraveling all of time as we know it!
Now we can open the Timeways to the past. Come on! We need to save Nozdormu.
Now, we have to face the infinites together this time. They're the black glowy dragons in the ravine.
Oh yes, Nozdormu. Very much so. And I can't wait for you to see it.
Oh, don't you worry. We'll find a way to stop them!
Oh, shoot. Can you handle this?
Oh, you know what I mean!
Poor Morchie. I wonder if we could have been friends in another time.
Right! We've got your back!
She did have great hair. Little heavy on the eyeliner, though.
That corpse above us, it's... it's Galakrond! He must have just fallen.
They want to... oh, oh there's no time to explain!
This never gets old.
We don't have time for this! Oh... Where is that relic I picked up?
We have to find the... uh... Proto-Aspects? They'll know what to do!
We only get one chance at this. Traveling so far into the past takes a lot of power, and I'm no Aspect.
We still have one anomaly to go! Let's head to the other side.
We still have to clear out the anomalies before we can travel to the past.
What a mess. The timeways are all misaligned!
What's this? A time relic? There's two arrows pointing to the right... Hmm...
When do you think the infinites went to, Nozdormu?
When time gets rewritten, things get messy here. Be ready for anything!
Yes, yes, I know.
You're not coming with us?
I sense strange energies below, and a great earthly power above. And something else...
These events make me wonder... what does our future hold?
I'd hardly say that.
For the future of Azeroth!
I cannot explain why, but... my instincts tell me we should trust her.
I... think I understand. We must preserve the future, and any knowledge you share may change that.
They should. Still, I want to ask. That future you are returning to... is it worth fighting for?
With me, champions. The pathway is opened.
Champions, you must destroy any anomalies that appear. We cannot have them further twisting the Timeways.
I do not know. They have often tried to corrupt the true timeline, but to invade the Bronze Temple to do so...
I have faith in you, my friends. And even should Murozond rise... know that all is not lost.
I have tracked the infinites to a place--a moment--where I dare not tread.
I shall be with you, in a sense. But not as you know me now.
Indeed. And they will stop at nothing to ensure the rise of my darkest self... Murozond.
Now, to open the Timeways.
The Infinite Dragonflight has already infiltrated the Timeways. We must follow.
The infinites have done well covering their tracks. This will take us some time.
We have no choice. Champions, you must fight. She cannot bar our path.
We will keep the reinforcements at bay while you take care of their commander.
So we're trapped?
This time?
Yes, my friends. Together, we will nurture all life on this world.
It was supposed to be... [her] time...
quotes.transcript: No! It was supposed to be... My time!

quotes.text: Aww, is the goodie-goody trying to save Nosdormu? Well, too bad.
quotes.transcript: Aww, is the goodie-goody trying to save Nosdormu? Well, too bad.

quotes.text: More more cheese are better than one
quotes.transcript: More more cheese are better than one

quotes.text: Heroes of Azeroth! More like zeros!
quotes.transcript: Heroes of Azeroth! More like zeros!

quotes.text: I'll get it together!
There can only be one more chi!
quotes.transcript: There can only be one more chi!

quotes.text: Time bomb away!
Stop in the name of Morchi!
quotes.transcript: Stop in the name of Morchi!

quotes.text: Too bad for you! I'll be sure to take real good care of the timeways!
quotes.transcript: Too bad for you! I'll be sure to take real good care of the timeways!

quotes.text: More cheese! Get out here!
I have friends too!
This will trip you all up!
quotes.transcript: This will trip you all up!

quotes.text: Let's put a pause on things!
quotes.transcript: Let's put a pause on things!

quotes.text: The true timeline is mine!
You won't ruin my timeline!
Oh sure, you can interrogate me. Or you could go save your precious bronze temple.
quotes.transcript: Oh sure, you can interrogate me. Or you could go save your precious bronze temple.

quotes.text: You! I'll deal with personally! This timeline has no need for heroes!
quotes.transcript: You! I'll deal with personally! This timeline has no need for heroes!

quotes.text: You all know what to do.
quotes.transcript: You all know what to do.

quotes.text: Whaaaa curh!!
Now stop getting beaten up!
What good are you all?
Each time, sand!
Huh figured it out. Did you a little too late?
quotes.transcript: Huh figured it out. Did you a little too late?

quotes.text: It's Morty, you brat! And yes, the time has come to bring about MuraZon!
quotes.transcript: It's Morty, you brat! And yes, the time has come to bring about MuraZon!

quotes.text: Wanna stop me? Catch me if you can!
quotes.transcript: Wanna stop me? Catch me if you can!

quotes.text: We shall ensure the rise of our master, Mirazand! And the longer you stand here talking to me, well...
quotes.transcript: We shall ensure the rise of our master, Mirazand! And the longer you stand here talking to me, well...

quotes.text: AAHAHAHAHAHAHA! muah! muahhh!
THNK HermIt
AHHHHHHHHHH
AHHHHHHHHHH
Inference to me!
You shall never wake, Ysera!
I have you now, Néstoru! Give in to your true self, to Morison!
quotes.transcript: I have you now, Néstoru! Give in to your true self, to Morison!

quotes.text: Merasad shall rise and lead us to a greater future! Can you not see?
quotes.transcript: Merasad shall rise and lead us to a greater future! Can you not see?

quotes.text: This will slow you down!
The Infinite Dawn rises, a future free of torment, perfected by our protection!
quotes.transcript: The Infinite Dawn rises, a future free of torment, perfected by our protection!

quotes.text: I fear I will have to deny your queen her prize. The disc you seek will be mine.
quotes.transcript: I fear I will have to deny your queen her prize. The disc you seek will be mine.

quotes.text: Now the disc is lost to time, just as you are about to be.
quotes.transcript: Now the disc is lost to time, just as you are about to be.

quotes.text: The second slow!
The second slow!
You are but flies!
Master Moon, your time is up!
quotes.transcript: Master Moon, your time is up!

quotes.text: Marisan's will is inevitable.
You will be lost in time!
quotes.transcript: You will be lost in time!

quotes.text: Your life was finite.
...Binevitable.
A predictable outcome.
The timelines are converging. There will be only one aspect, and Murson shall be infinite!
quotes.transcript: The timelines are converging. There will be only one aspect, and Murson shall be infinite!

quotes.text: Seize your actions!
You cannot stop me!
Mazdor move! Your time is up!
quotes.transcript: Mazdor move! Your time is up!

quotes.text: The Infinite Sheldon!
Our infinite vision, shall one day be agh!
quotes.transcript: Our infinite vision, shall one day be agh!

quotes.text: You're all blind!
You blind fools!
Merazan shall rise and lead us to a greater future! Can you not see?
quotes.transcript: Merazan shall rise and lead us to a greater future! Can you not see?

quotes.text: What have we here? Alexstrasza's lap dogs, I suspect.
quotes.transcript: What have we here? Alexstrasza's lap dogs, I suspect.

quotes.text: This disk may hold the secret to the aspects regaining their power, and we cannot allow that to happen.
quotes.transcript: This disk may hold the secret to the aspects regaining their power, and we cannot allow that to happen.

quotes.text: The time weighs answer to me!
quotes.transcript: The time weighs answer to me!

quotes.text: You cannot even comprehend the infinite possibilities!
quotes.transcript: You cannot even comprehend the infinite possibilities!

quotes.text: Can you feel your feet closing in?
quotes.transcript: Can you feel your feet closing in?

quotes.text: The sands will scour you from this timeline!
quotes.transcript: The sands will scour you from this timeline!

quotes.text: Your efforts are impressive, but in vain.
quotes.transcript: Your efforts are impressive, but in vain.

quotes.text: This will slow you down!
Time itself enshrouds me!
Seize your actions!
You cannot stop me!
Queen of Dragons! You're nothing!
Not the Earth Water yet, are you?
quotes.transcript: Not the Earth Water yet, are you?

quotes.text: You shall never wait, Ysera!
We are inevitable!
We are inevitable!
We are infinite!
I have you now, Nastorno. Give in to your true self, to Morisand!
quotes.transcript: I have you now, Nastorno. Give in to your true self, to Morisand!

quotes.text: The Infinite Dawn Rises, a future free of torment, perfected by our protection!
quotes.transcript: The Infinite Dawn Rises, a future free of torment, perfected by our protection!

quotes.text: You blind fools!
You are nothing!
Mirazan's vision shall finally come to pass!
quotes.transcript: Mirazan's vision shall finally come to pass!

quotes.text: Lost in the sands!
In all timelines, you failed to stop me.
quotes.transcript: In all timelines, you failed to stop me.

quotes.text: Your failures are infinite.
Sons of Eternity protect me!
Sanzas of Eternity, protect me!
Time itself enshrouds me!
You are but flies!
Invulets To Be!
Come, my Invinits!
Come, my Invenents!
Queen of Dragons, you're nothing!
Not the Earth Water yet, are you?
quotes.transcript: Not the Earth Water yet, are you?

quotes.text: What is a spell, Mieber? Without his spells!
quotes.transcript: What is a spell, Mieber? Without his spells!

quotes.text: What is a spell, Liba? Without his spells!
quotes.transcript: What is a spell, Liba? Without his spells!

quotes.text: De N. Welts an Dorn!
Our infinite vision shall one day be...
quotes.transcript: Our infinite vision shall one day be...

quotes.text: The world's open. Can you not see?
quotes.transcript: The world's open. Can you not see?

quotes.text: The world shall burn. Can you not see?
quotes.transcript: The world shall burn. Can you not see?

quotes.text: You're all blind!
We are infinite!
You are nothing!
The Infinite Profiles!
The infinite prevails!
Marisan's will is inevitable!
Merazons vision shall finally come to pass!
quotes.transcript: Merazons vision shall finally come to pass!
